description.zh: 蚂蚁集团推出的企业级设计系统，提供完整的设计规范、资源沉淀与高质量 React 组件生态，也覆盖部分 Vue 社区实现。
description.en: An enterprise-oriented design system from Ant Group with comprehensive guidelines, design assets, and a mature React component ecosystem, plus related Vue community implementations.

description.zh: 面向 Vue 3 的主流组件库与设计语言，强调开箱即用、组件完整和后台系统开发效率，适合中后台与内容型站点。
description.en: A mainstream Vue 3 component library and design language focused on ready-to-use building blocks, broad component coverage, and productivity for admin and content-heavy products.

description.zh: Atlassian 官方设计系统，为 Jira、Confluence 等产品统一视觉语言、设计原则、内容规范与前端实现模式。
description.en: Atlassian's official design system that aligns visual language, principles, content guidance, and implementation patterns across products like Jira and Confluence.

description.zh: 建立在 Radix 与 Tailwind 之上的现代组件集合，强调可复制、可组合、可深度定制，适合快速搭建定制化 React 界面。
description.en: A modern component collection built on Radix and Tailwind, optimized for copy-paste workflows, composability, and deep customization in React products.

description.zh: Uber 推出的 React 设计系统与组件库，强调可扩展主题、完整组件覆盖和适合长期演进的产品基础设施。
description.en: Uber's React design system and component library focused on scalable theming, broad component coverage, and a durable foundation for evolving products.

description.zh: Palantir 的 React UI 工具包，适合数据密集型桌面风格应用，常用于后台、分析和复杂交互场景。
description.en: Palantir's React UI toolkit for data-dense, desktop-style applications, commonly used in admin, analytics, and complex interaction scenarios.

description.zh: 强调可访问性、主题定制和开发体验的 React 组件系统，适合快速构建现代产品界面。
description.en: A React component system focused on accessibility, theming, and developer experience for building modern product interfaces quickly.

description.zh: IBM 的设计系统，覆盖设计原则、开发资源与跨产品组件库，适合大型组织统一设计语言。
description.en: IBM's design system spanning principles, development resources, and shared components for large organizations with a unified design language.

description.zh: 微软官方前端设计系统与 React 组件库，强调一致性、无障碍和企业应用集成能力。
description.en: Microsoft's official frontend design system and React component library emphasizing consistency, accessibility, and enterprise-ready integration.

description.zh: Grommet 提供设计资源、布局能力与 React 组件，适合从概念验证快速走向完整应用。
description.en: Grommet combines design resources, layout primitives, and React components to help teams move from concept to full applications.

description.zh: 基于 Material Design 的 React 组件库与设计体系，生态成熟，适合快速搭建通用型 Web 应用。
description.en: A mature React component library and design system based on Material Design, well suited for building general-purpose web applications quickly.

description.zh: Shopify 的产品设计系统，围绕商家产品体验建立统一的设计语言、内容规范与组件实现。
description.en: Shopify's product design system built to unify design language, content guidance, and component implementation across merchant-facing experiences.
